game_info.title: Harvest Haven - Farming Game
game_info.concept: Stardew Valley Stardew Valley is an open-ended farming and life simulation RPG where players restore a dilapidated farm, engaging in activities like planting crops, raising livestock, fishing, mining, and interacting with townspeople. The game operates on a daily and seasonal cycle affecting gameplay, requiring players to manage energy and health, utilize tools, and craft items, while skill levels (farming, mining, etc.) improve over time, unlocking new recipes and abilities.
game_info.description: Welcome to Harvest Haven! You've inherited a small farm that needs restoration. Plant and harvest crops through the seasons, manage your energy wisely, and upgrade your tools to become a master farmer. Watch your farm grow as you unlock new seeds and abilities. Can you create a thriving farm and reach level 10 in farming?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move around the farm
Space: Use equipped tool (till soil, water crops, harvest)
Shift: Open inventory/shop menu
Z: Switch between tools (Hoe, Watering Can, Scythe)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic farming mechanics: planting, watering, and harvesting crops. Verifies that the player can successfully complete a full crop cycle and gain experience.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move to empty tilled soil, plant seeds, water them daily, and harvest when ready. Repeat the cycle to test multiple harvests and ensure experience points accumulate correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully plants, waters, and harvests crops. Experience increases with each harvest. Crops grow through their stages properly. Energy depletes with actions and regenerates over time.
